<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Original Construction & Landscaping | Albuquerque, NM</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
  :root {
    --green-dark: #1a3a1f;
    --green-mid: #2d5a35;
    --green-bright: #4a8c55;
    --green-light: #7aba84;
    --sand: #d4b483;
    --sand-light: #f0e0c0;
    --cream: #faf6ee;
    --brown: #5c3d1e;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --text-dark: #1a1a1a;
    --text-mid: #444;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--text-dark);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(26,58,31,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    padding: 18px 60px;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(122,186,132,0.2);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem; color: var(--sand);
    font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--green-light); }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 36px; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--sand); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--sand); color: var(--green-dark);
    padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 4px;
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; border: none;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--sand-light); }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    background:
      linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(26,58,31,0.88) 0%, rgba(45,90,53,0.7) 60%, rgba(74,140,85,0.4) 100%),
      url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558618666-fcd25c85cd64?w=1600') center/cover no-repeat;
    display: flex; align-items: center;
    padding: 120px 60px 80px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 120px;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--cream), transparent);
  }
  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(212,180,131,0.2);
    border: 1px solid var(--sand);
    color: var(--sand); padding: 6px 18px;
    border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.78rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease both;
  }
  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5.5rem);
    color: var(--white); font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.08; margin-bottom: 24px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.15s ease both;
  }
  .hero-title .accent { color: var(--green-light); }
  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.15rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.82);
    max-width: 520px; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 40px;
    font-weight: 300;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s ease both;
  }
  .hero-buttons {
    display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.45s ease both;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--sand); color: var(--green-dark);
    padding: 16px 36px; border-radius: 4px;
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: all 0.2s;
    text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--white); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--white);
    padding: 16px 36px; border-radius: 4px;
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    transition: all 0.2s; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--white); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }

  .hero-stats {
    position: absolute; bottom: 80px; right: 60px;
    display: flex; gap: 40px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.6s ease both;
  }
  .stat { text-align: center; }
  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 2.4rem; color: var(--sand);
    font-weight: 900; line-height: 1;
  }
  .stat-label { font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 4px; }

  /* ── SECTION COMMON ── */
  section { padding: 100px 60px; }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--green-bright); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem);
    font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2;
    color: var(--green-dark); margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .section-sub {
    font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.7; max-width: 560px; font-weight: 300;
  }

  /* ── SERVICES ── */
  #services { background: var(--white); }
  .services-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
    gap: 28px; margin-top: 60px;
  }
  .service-card {
    background: var(--cream);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74,140,85,0.15);
    border-radius: 12px; padding: 36px 28px;
    transition: all 0.3s; cursor: default; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .service-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--green-bright), var(--sand));
    transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(26,58,31,0.12); }
  .service-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .service-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 18px; }
  .service-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--green-dark); margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .service-desc { font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.65; }
  .service-tag {
    display: inline-block; margin-top: 16px;
    background: rgba(74,140,85,0.1); color: var(--green-bright);
    padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  /* ── WHY US ── */
  #why {
    background: var(--green-dark);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  #why::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: -100px; right: -100px;
    width: 500px; height: 500px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(74,140,85,0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  #why .section-title { color: var(--white); }
  #why .section-label { color: var(--sand); }
  #why .section-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); }
  .why-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 24px; margin-top: 60px;
  }
  .why-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 30px 24px;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .why-card:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); }
  .why-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .why-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--sand); margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .why-desc { font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ── REVIEWS CAROUSEL ── */
  #reviews { background: var(--cream); }
  .reviews-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 50px; }
  .stars-total {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  }
  .stars { color: #f5b731; font-size: 1.3rem; letter-spacing: 2px; }
  .stars-text { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--text-mid); }
  .carousel-wrap { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .carousel-track {
    display: flex; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
  }
  .review-card {
    min-width: 380px; max-width: 380px;
    background: var(--white);
    border-radius: 14px; padding: 36px 32px;
    margin-right: 24px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74,140,85,0.1);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .review-stars { color: #f5b731; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .review-text {
    font-size: 0.97rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text-mid);
    font-style: italic; margin-bottom: 24px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .review-text::before {
    content: '"';
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 5rem; color: rgba(74,140,85,0.1);
    position: absolute; top: -20px; left: -10px;
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .review-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; }
  .review-avatar {
    width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-bright), var(--green-light));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    color: var(--white); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.1rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .review-name { font-weight: 600; color: var(--green-dark); font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .review-job { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-mid); margin-top: 2px; }
  .carousel-controls { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 32px; }
  .carousel-btn {
    width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid var(--green-bright); background: transparent;
    color: var(--green-bright); font-size: 1.2rem;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }
  .carousel-btn:hover { background: var(--green-bright); color: var(--white); }
  .carousel-dots { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-left: 16px; }
  .dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(74,140,85,0.3); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .dot.active { background: var(--green-bright); width: 24px; border-radius: 4px; }

  /* ── FREE ESTIMATE FORM ── */
  #estimate {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-mid), var(--green-dark));
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  #estimate::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; bottom: -80px; right: -80px;
    width: 400px; height: 400px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(212,180,131,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  #estimate .section-title { color: var(--white); }
  #estimate .section-label { color: var(--sand); }
  #estimate .section-sub { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
  .estimate-layout {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px; margin-top: 60px; align-items: start;
  }
  .estimate-perks { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; }
  .perk { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; }
  .perk-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 8px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.3rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .perk-title { font-weight: 600; color: var(--sand); font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .perk-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); margin-top: 4px; }
  .estimate-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
  .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
  .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
  .form-group label { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .form-group input, .form-group select, .form-group textarea {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px;
    color: var(--white); font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
    outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .form-group input::placeholder,
  .form-group textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); }
  .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus, .form-group textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--sand);
  }
  .form-group select option { background: var(--green-dark); }
  .form-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 100px; }
  .submit-btn {
    background: var(--sand); color: var(--green-dark);
    padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none;
    font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s; margin-top: 8px;
  }
  .submit-btn:hover { background: var(--white); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .form-success {
    display: none;
    background: rgba(122,186,132,0.2); border: 1px solid var(--green-light);
    border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; text-align: center;
    color: var(--white); font-weight: 500;
  }

  /* ── GALLERY STRIP ── */
  #gallery { background: var(--white); padding: 80px 0; }
  #gallery .inner { padding: 0 60px; }
  .gallery-strip {
    display: flex; gap: 16px; margin-top: 40px;
    overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 16px;
    scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: var(--green-light) transparent;
  }
  .gallery-item {
    min-width: 280px; height: 200px; border-radius: 10px;
    overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
    position: relative; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .gallery-item img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.4s; }
  .gallery-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.08); }
  .gallery-label {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(26,58,31,0.85));
    color: var(--white); padding: 20px 16px 12px;
    font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: var(--green-dark);
    padding: 70px 60px 40px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  }
  .footer-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 60px; margin-bottom: 60px;
  }
  .footer-brand .nav-logo { font-size: 1.5rem; display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .footer-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; max-width: 280px; }
  .footer-phone {
    margin-top: 20px;
    font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--sand); font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  }
  .footer-col h4 {
    font-size: 0.78rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--sand);
    font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .footer-col ul { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .footer-col ul li a {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.9rem; transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-col ul li a:hover { color: var(--sand); }
  .footer-bottom {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    padding-top: 30px; display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
  }
  .footer-bottom p { font-size: 0.82rem; }
  .footer-badges { display: flex; gap: 10px; }
  .badge {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  }

  /* ── FLOATING CTA ── */
  .float-cta {
    position: fixed; bottom: 30px; right: 30px; z-index: 99;
    background: var(--green-dark); color: var(--sand);
    padding: 14px 22px; border-radius: 50px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    animation: fadeUp 1s 1s ease both;
  }
  .float-cta:hover { background: var(--green-mid); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .float-cta .pulse {
    width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--green-light);
    animation: pulse 1.5s infinite;
  }

  /* ── SEASONAL BANNER ── */
  .seasonal-banner {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--sand), #c9a55a);
    color: var(--green-dark); text-align: center;
    padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
  }
  .seasonal-banner span { font-weight: 800; }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
    50% { transform: scale(1.4); opacity: 0.6; }
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 16px 24px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    section { padding: 70px 24px; }
    .hero { padding: 100px 24px 80px; }
    .hero-stats { position: static; margin-top: 40px; }
    .estimate-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 36px; }
    .review-card { min-width: 300px; max-width: 300px; }
    #gallery .inner { padding: 0 24px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Seasonal Banner -->
<div class="seasonal-banner">
  🌵 <span>Spring Special:</span> Free gravel re-leveling with any landscaping project booked this month! Call (505) 307-9746
</div>

<!-- Nav -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Original <span>Construction</span> & Landscaping</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#why">Why Us</a></li>
    <li><a href="#reviews">Reviews</a></li>
    <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
    <li><a href="#estimate">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="nav-cta" onclick="document.getElementById('estimate').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">Free Estimate</button>
</nav>

<!-- Hero -->
<section class="hero">
  <div>
    <div class="hero-badge">⭐ Albuquerque's #1 Landscaping Company</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">We Build<br>Yards <span class="accent">You'll Love</span><br>For Years</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Family-owned and operated in Albuquerque, NM. From artificial turf to custom pavers and fencing — we do it your way, every time.</p>
    <div class="hero-buttons">
      <a href="#estimate" class="btn-primary">Get Free Estimate</a>
      <a href="tel:5053079746" class="btn-outline">📞 (505) 307-9746</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">8+</div><div class="stat-label">Years in Business</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">5★</div><div class="stat-label">Average Rating</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">100%</div><div class="stat-label">Satisfaction Goal</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Services -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="section-label">What We Do</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Our Services</h2>
  <p class="section-sub">From full yard makeovers to individual installations, we handle every detail with craftsmanship and care.</p>
  <div class="services-grid">
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon">🌿</div>
      <div class="service-title">Custom Gate & Masonry</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Low-maintenance, lush green turf that looks perfect year-round — no water, no mowing, no stress. Ideal for Albuquerque's dry climate.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Most Popular</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon">🪨</div>
      <div class="service-title">Pavers & Patios</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Custom paver installations for driveways, patios, walkways, and pool surrounds. Built to last with precision craftsmanship.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Top Rated</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon">🪵</div>
      <div class="service-title">Fencing</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Wood, vinyl, or chain-link — we tear down old fences and rebuild beautiful, sturdy enclosures around your property.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Fast Install</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon">🌵</div>
      <div class="service-title">Gravel & Rock</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Desert-style gravel landscaping that fits Albuquerque's environment. Re-leveling, new installs, and decorative rock arrangements.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Great Curb Appeal</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon">➕</div>
      <div class="service-title">& Much More</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Don't see what you're looking for? We offer a wide range of additional landscaping and construction services. Give us a call and we'll make it happen.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Ask Us</span>
    </div>
    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="service-icon">🏗️</div>
      <div class="service-title">Yard Makeovers</div>
      <p class="service-desc">Full yard transformations from concept to completion. We combine all our services into one cohesive, stunning outdoor space.</p>
      <span class="service-tag">Full Service</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Why Us -->
<section id="why">
  <div class="section-label">Why Choose Us</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">The Original Difference</h2>
  <p class="section-sub">We're not just another contractor. We're your neighbors, and we treat your property like our own.</p>
  <div class="why-grid">
    <div class="why-card">
      <div class="why-icon">👨‍👩‍👧</div>
      <div class="why-title">Family Owned & Operated</div>
      <p class="why-desc">Patrick, Sylvia, and the whole crew pour their heart into every project. You're not a number — you're a neighbor.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="why-card">
      <div class="why-icon">⚡</div>
      <div class="why-title">Fast & Reliable</div>
      <p class="why-desc">Quick estimates, on-time starts, and jobs that often finish ahead of schedule. We respect your time.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="why-card">
      <div class="why-icon">💰</div>
      <div class="why-title">Competitive Pricing</div>
      <p class="why-desc">Top-tier quality without the inflated price tag. We match or beat competitors — and outwork them every time.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="why-card">
      <div class="why-icon">🤝</div>
      <div class="why-title">No Sub-Contractors</div>
      <p class="why-desc">Every job is handled by our own trusted crew — no outsourcing, no strangers on your property. You get the same team, every time.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="why-card">
      <div class="why-icon">📋</div>
      <div class="why-title">Free Estimates</div>
      <p class="why-desc">No obligation, no pressure. We come to you, assess the job, and give you a clear, honest quote upfront.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="why-card">
      <div class="why-icon">✅</div>
      <div class="why-title">Done Your Way</div>
      <p class="why-desc">We listen first. Your vision guides every decision we make, from materials to layout to finishing touches.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Reviews -->
<section id="reviews">
  <div class="reviews-header">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">What Customers Say</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Real Reviews</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="stars-total">
      <span class="stars">★★★★★</span>
      <span class="stars-text">5.0 · Google Reviews</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="carousel-wrap">
    <div class="carousel-track" id="carouselTrack">
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">Patrick, Sylvia, and their team are absolutely wonderful! They transformed our backyard from a dirt lot into the beautiful, low-maintenance backyard we imagined. They installed a stone patio, retaining walls, gravel, artificial turf, a flagstone walkway, plants, and a pergola. We couldn't be happier with the result.</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Full Backyard Transformation · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">Very professional and prompt with service. Their work is amazing. I will definitely call them again for more work when I need it done. Awesome people!</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">General Landscaping · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">We could not be happier with the work done at our home. We've received numerous compliments from neighbors and friends. They are extremely easy to work with, show up when they say they will, and have an amazing work ethic. We whole heartedly recommend them for your construction and landscaping needs.</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Home Landscaping · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">They do exceptional work. Their attention to detail makes all the difference. They've done three jobs for me and each one has been reasonably priced, high quality, and they always show up on schedule and on time. Could not be happier.</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Multiple Projects · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">I had them do some yard care work for me. They communicated well, showed up on time, gave me a good price, and did a great job. I'm sure they can do much more complex jobs too. I'll be calling them again!</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Yard Care · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">Fantastic. I cannot stress this enough. It's hard to find a company that can compare. They installed artificial turf, a flagstone patio and some planters. High quality at a very fair price. Knowledgeable and just really nice people. I really appreciated the communication and professionalism.</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Turf, Patio & Planters · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">They laid an area of pavers in my backyard and it came out great! They understood what I needed and didn't make it complicated. I am so relieved and very happy with the work. Very nice people, thank you both!</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Paver Installation · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">The OCL team was the best we could have hoped for! Professional, timely, courteous, honest and hardworking. They led us through planning, material choices, and suggestions for improvement, then executed our plan exceptionally well on schedule. Can't give enough kudos to them!</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Full Yard Project · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">I couldn't be happier with the job Original Landscaping did. Patrick and Sylvia were amazing to work with. I'd recommend this company to anyone and everyone.</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Landscaping · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">Very professional for an excellent price! You can't go wrong with these fine landscapers!</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Landscaping · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="review-card">
        <div class="review-stars">★★★★★</div>
        <p class="review-text">Extremely satisfied with the work removing our dead grass, adding fresh soil, and installing new sod. They offered a very competitive quote, responded promptly, and completed the entire project in about four hours. Efficient, well-organized, friendly, and professional. We wouldn't hesitate to hire them again!</p>
        <div class="review-author">
          <div class="review-avatar">⭐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="review-name">Verified Google Review</div>
            <div class="review-job">Sod Installation · Albuquerque, NM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="carousel-controls">
    <button class="carousel-btn" id="prevBtn" onclick="moveCarousel(-1)">←</button>
    <button class="carousel-btn" id="nextBtn" onclick="moveCarousel(1)">→</button>
    <div class="carousel-dots" id="carouselDots"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Gallery -->
<section id="gallery">
  <div class="inner">
    <div class="section-label">Our Work</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Project Gallery</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="gallery-strip">
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Artificial turf"/>
      <div class="gallery-label">Custom Gate & Masonry</div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
